title: NASA's Year-Long Mars Simulation

scenes.text: A group of volunteers is living on Mars, right here on Earth.
NASA's simulation lasts for an entire year, testing life on Mars.
Participants experience isolation and limited resources like real astronauts.
This is vital for planning future human missions to the red planet.
scenes.label: PLANNING FOR MARS

scenes.text: Follow to feed your curious mind daily.

description: NASA conducts a year-long simulation to prepare for Mars missions, testing life in isolation. Follow for more on Mars exploration!
